(スプリングステークス, *supuringu sutēkusu*) is a [Grade 2](/wiki/Conditions_races "Conditions races") [flat](/wiki/Flat_racing "Flat racing") [horse race](/wiki/Horse_racing "Horse racing") in [Japan](/wiki/Japan "Japan") for three-year-old [Thoroughbred](/wiki/Thoroughbred "Thoroughbred") [colts](/wiki/Colt_(horse) "Colt (horse)") and [fillies](/wiki/Filly "Filly") run over a distance of 1,800 metres at [Nakayama Racecourse](/wiki/Nakayama_Racecourse "Nakayama Racecourse"), [Funabashi](/wiki/Funabashi,_Chiba "Funabashi, Chiba"), [Chiba](/wiki/Chiba_Prefecture "Chiba Prefecture"). The race is run in March and serves as a major trial race for the [Satsuki Sho](/wiki/Satsuki_Sho "Satsuki Sho"), which is run at the same racecourse in April.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
["SPRING STAKES (G2)"](http://japanracing.jp/_races/2015races/0322spring.html). japanracing.jp.
["スプリングS"](https://race.netkeiba.com/special/index.html?id=0032). *Netkeiba*.
["Fuji TV Sho Spring Stakes"](https://en.netkeiba.com/race/special.html?id=0032). *Netkeiba*.

Horse race

Spring Stakes  
スプリングステークス

The **Spring Stakes** (スプリングステークス, *supuringu sutēkusu*) is a [Grade 2](/wiki/Conditions_races "Conditions races") [flat](/wiki/Flat_racing "Flat racing") [horse race](/wiki/Horse_racing "Horse racing") in [Japan](/wiki/Japan "Japan") for three-year-old [Thoroughbred](/wiki/Thoroughbred "Thoroughbred") [colts](/wiki/Colt_(horse) "Colt (horse)") and [fillies](/wiki/Filly "Filly") run over a distance of 1,800 metres at [Nakayama Racecourse](/wiki/Nakayama_Racecourse "Nakayama Racecourse"), [Funabashi](/wiki/Funabashi,_Chiba "Funabashi, Chiba"), [Chiba](/wiki/Chiba_Prefecture "Chiba Prefecture"). The race is run in March and serves as a major trial race for the [Satsuki Sho](/wiki/Satsuki_Sho "Satsuki Sho"), which is run at the same racecourse in April.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

It was first run in 1952. Among the winners of the race have been [Shinzan](/wiki/Shinzan "Shinzan"), [Narita Brian](/wiki/Narita_Brian "Narita Brian"), [Bubble Gum Fellow](/wiki/Bubble_Gum_Fellow "Bubble Gum Fellow"), [Neo Universe](/wiki/Neo_Universe "Neo Universe"), [Meisho Samson](/wiki/Meisho_Samson "Meisho Samson") and [Orfevre](/wiki/Orfevre "Orfevre").
